3128370.name: Hypno Demo
3128370.description:
• Visually stunning arcade inspired adrenaline rush

  • Unique music format developed specifically for Hypno to allow players to DJ and remix music while playing the game

  • Simple, minimalist game mechanics with layers upon layers of advanced techniques

  • Challenging, yet rewarding progression system that allows committed players to fully customize their Hypno experience

Unlock the Avatar

The goal of this demo is to unlock the Avatar at level 19.

Unlocking the Avatar also grants you a special perk - the access to the Avatar's third eye, that suggests the shortest path to Zone Sync, which is the highest yielding, but also the most difficult game strategy. But you might want to switch to Playtest Build if you wanna get serious about this direction.

First get your Playtest Token, then visit our Discord to find out how to apply for Playtest access.

Demo Features

  • One minute long Grind Mode which is at the core of Hypno's main game loop

  • Hypno Ladder with 20 unlockable upgrades

  • Unlockable Walker previews for all types and all zones

Available Upgrades

  • [01] Energy Outlines

  • [02] Rotation Speed Level II

  • [03] Grid Fidelity Level II

  • [04] Portals Level II

  • [05] Walker Preview Zone II

  • [06] Skin Style II

  • [07] Rotation Speed Level III

  • [08] Grid Fidelity Level III

  • [09] Portals Level III

  • [10] Walker Preview Zone III

  • [11] Skin Style III

  • [12] Rotation Speed Level IIII

  • [13] Grid Fidelity Level IIII

  • [14] Portals Level IIII

  • [15] Walker Preview Zone IIII

  • [16] Skin Style IIII

  • [17] Charge Auto Release Disabled

  • [18] Portals Level Max

  • [19] Avatar

  • [20] Playtest Token
